originalTitle: Watch: What links a bomb in Monaco and a shooting in Ukraine?
summary: A Ukrainian intelligence agent who confessed to killing the woman suspected of trying to assassinate a multimillionaire in Monaco, has now claimed he did not pull the trigger.
content:
Ukrainian intelligence agent Vladyslav Reut says he did not kill Anastasiia Berezovska - a woman suspected of trying to assassinate a multimillionaire in Monaco - despite earlier confessing to it.

Reut instead blamed his co-defendant Vitalii Zhykovych for the killing of Berezovska.

BBC correspondent Sarah Rainsford was in the courtroom in Kyiv when the claims were made and explains the latest developments. More on this story.
chineseTitle: 观看：摩纳哥的炸弹和乌克兰的枪击事件有何联系？
chineseSummary: 一名乌克兰情报人员承认杀害了涉嫌试图刺杀摩纳哥百万富翁的女子，现在声称他没有扣动扳机。
chineseContent:
乌克兰情报特工弗拉迪斯拉夫·罗伊特表示，他并没有杀死阿纳斯塔西娅·别列佐夫斯卡（Anastasiia Berezovska）——一名涉嫌试图刺杀摩纳哥百万富翁的女性——尽管他早些时候承认了这一点。

相反，罗伊特指责他的同案被告维塔利·日科维奇杀害了别列佐夫斯卡。

BBC 记者莎拉·雷恩斯福德 (Sarah Rainsford) 提出索赔时正在基辅法庭，并解释了最新进展。更多关于这个故事的内容。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于全球新闻信号，适合用于观察外部环境、政策变化、地缘风险和市场情绪。
